curation_notes: Primary patch commit 78a7ff2 touches 10 non-test source files across cli, gateway, infra, and node-host directories. Locations derived from the patch diff: hardenApprovedExecutionPaths in invoke-system-run.ts lacked parent-symlink detection (the fix added hasMutableSymlinkPathComponentSync), and sanitizeSystemRunParamsForForwarding in node-invoke-system-run-approval.ts trusted caller-supplied params instead of immutable approval-time plans (the fix added systemRunPlanV2 canonical field usage). Four follow-up commits are refactors that reorganize the same code but do not introduce new security logic.
